# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import { getRepository } from 'typeorm';

type ProductRow = {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  description: string | null;
  price: number;
  currency: string;
  category_id: number | null;
  brand_id: number | null;
  in_stock: boolean;
  rating: number | null;
  created_at: Date;
  updated_at: Date;
};

const router = express.Router();

function toStringValue(value: unknown): string | undefined {
  if (typeof value === 'string') {
    const trimmed = value.trim();
    return trimmed.length ? trimmed : undefined;
  }
  if (Array.isArray(value) && typeof value[0] === 'string') {
    const trimmed = value[0].trim();
    return trimmed.length ? trimmed : undefined;
  }
  return undefined;
}

function toNumberValue(value: unknown): number | undefined {
  const raw = Array.isArray(value) ? value[0] : value;
  if (raw === undefined || raw === null || raw === '') return undefined;
  const n = Number(raw);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : undefined;
}

function toBooleanValue(value: unknown): boolean | undefined {
  const raw = Array.isArray(value) ? value[0] : value;
  if (raw === undefined || raw === null || raw === '') return undefined;
  if (raw === true || raw === 'true' || raw === '1' || raw === 1) return true;
  if (raw === false || raw === 'false' || raw === '0' || raw === 0) return false;
  return undefined;
}

function toStringArrayValue(value: unknown): string[] | undefined {
  if (typeof value === 'string') {
    const arr = value
      .split(',')
      .map((v) => v.trim())
      .filter(Boolean);
    return arr.length ? arr : undefined;
  }
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    const arr = value
      .flatMap((v) => (typeof v === 'string' ? v.split(',') : []))
      .map((v) => v.trim())
      .filter(Boolean);
    return arr.length ? arr : undefined;
  }
  return undefined;
}

router.get('/products/search', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const q = req.query;

    const search = toStringValue(q.search);
    const categoryId = toNumberValue(q.categoryId);
    const brandId = toNumberValue(q.brandId);
    const minPrice = toNumberValue(q.minPrice);
    const maxPrice = toNumberValue(q.maxPrice);
    const inStock = toBooleanValue(q.inStock);
    const minRating = toNumberValue(q.minRating);
    const sort = toStringValue(q.sort) ?? 'created_at';
    const order = (toStringValue(q.order)?.toUpperCase() === 'ASC' ? 'ASC' : 'DESC') as 'ASC' | 'DESC';
    const limit = Math.min(Math.max(toNumberValue(q.limit) ?? 20, 1), 100);
    const offset = Math.max(toNumberValue(q.offset) ?? 0, 0);
    const ids = toStringArrayValue(q.ids)?.map((v) => Number(v)).filter((v) => Number.isFinite(v));
    const currency = toStringValue(q.currency);

    const conditions: string[] = ['1=1'];
    const params: any[] = [];

    if (search) {
      params.push(`%${search}%`);
      conditions.push(`(p.name ILIKE $${params.length} OR p.description ILIKE $${params.length})`);
    }

    if (categoryId !== undefined) {
      params.push(categoryId);
      conditions.push(`p.category_id = $${params.length}`);
    }

    if (brandId !== undefined) {
      params.push(brandId);
      conditions.push(`p.brand_id = $${params.length}`);
    }

    if (minPrice !== undefined) {
      params.push(minPrice);
      conditions.push(`p.price >= $${params.length}`);
    }

    if (maxPrice !== undefined) {
      params.push(maxPrice);
      conditions.push(`p.price <= $${params.length}`);
    }

    if (inStock !== undefined) {
      params.push(inStock);
      conditions.push(`p.in_stock = $${params.length}`);
    }

    if (minRating !== undefined) {
      params.push(minRating);
      conditions.push(`p.rating >= $${params.length}`);
    }

    if (ids && ids.length) {
      params.push(ids);
      conditions.push(`p.id = ANY($${params.length})`);
    }

    if (currency) {
      params.push(currency);
      conditions.push(`p.currency = $${params.length}`);
    }

    const allowedSortFields = new Set([
      'id',
      'name',
      'price',
      'rating',
      'created_at',
      'updated_at',
    ]);

    const sortField = allowedSortFields.has(sort) ? sort : 'created_at';

    const sql = `
      SELECT
        p.id,
        p.name,
        p.description,
        p.price,
        p.currency,
        p.category_id,
        p.brand_id,
        p.in_stock,
        p.rating,
        p.created_at,
        p.updated_at
      FROM products p
      WHERE ${conditions.join(' AND ')}
      ORDER BY p.${sortField} ${order}
      LIMIT $${params.length + 1}
      OFFSET $${params.length + 2}
    `;

    params.push(limit, offset);

    const repository = getRepository('Product');
    const rows = await repository.query(sql, params);

    const items = rows as ProductRow[];

    const countSql = `
      SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total
      FROM products p
      WHERE ${conditions.join(' AND ')}
    `;

    const countResult = await repository.query(countSql, params.slice(0, -2));
    const total = countResult?.[0]?.total ?? 0;

    res.json({
      total,
      limit,
      offset,
      items,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(500).json({
      message: 'Failed to search products',
    });
  }
});

export default router;
